title: Monster Mascot Logo AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Original playful mascot wordmark logo for Little Elephant Fast Food, built around friendly little elephant mascot holding a tiny burger and fries, with round ears and a happy face and cheerful, hungry, trustworthy, and cute. Subject: friendly little elephant mascot holding a tiny burger and fries, with round ears and a happy face is the memorable mascot hero with a clear expression, rounded simplified shape, commercial brand-avatar readability, and personality: cheerful, hungry, trustworthy, and cute. Scene: fast food ordering app and snack shop defines the small-shop brand context while the logo remains centered on a clean white or pale background for packaging, avatar, sticker, and storefront use. Composition: Fixed square 1:1 logo composition: mascot and wordmark integrated as one mark, readable Little Elephant Fast Food lettering, compact FAST FOOD secondary text, centered balance, clear silhouette, and small supporting prop detail: tiny burger, fries, and rounded badge dots. Signature Elements: tiny burger, fries, and rounded badge dots supports the mascot action without turning the image into a full illustration; the result stays like a real usable small-shop mascot logo. Style: Playful mascot wordmark logo with flat clean vector-like shapes, rounded exaggerated character design, bold custom lettering, light retro-shop charm, IP-ready brand personality, and commercial logo polish. Color Palette: Bright but controlled two-to-four-color logo palette with clean contrast, simple filled shapes, pale background, and enough restraint for real storefront or packaging use. Lighting: Flat logo presentation with crisp edges, subtle print-friendly depth only where it helps readability, and clean separation between mascot, wordmark, and secondary text. Typography: Render Little Elephant Fast Food as the main readable custom wordmark; add FAST FOOD as small integrated secondary type; keep all text intentional and part of the logo system. Restrictions: Keep one coherent original mascot, integrated wordmark, readable brand name, compact subtitle, simple centered logo structure, clean outlines, and commercial brand-system usability.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Monster Mascot Logo Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Original playful mascot wordmark logo for Momo Food Express, built around bubbly citrus monster mascot carrying a noodle bowl and tiny delivery bag, with soda-pop eyes and small arms and fast, mischievous, upbeat, and lovable. Subject: bubbly citrus monster mascot carrying a noodle bowl and tiny delivery bag, with soda-pop eyes and small arms is the memorable mascot hero with a clear expression, rounded simplified shape, commercial brand-avatar readability, and personality: fast, mischievous, upbeat, and lovable. Scene: local delivery app and playful neighborhood food brand defines the small-shop brand context while the logo remains centered on a clean white or pale background for packaging, avatar, sticker, and storefront use. Composition: Fixed square 1:1 logo composition: mascot and wordmark integrated as one mark, readable Momo Food Express lettering, compact LOCAL DELIVERY secondary text, centered balance, clear silhouette, and small supporting prop detail: mini delivery bag, noodle bowl, and small motion bubbles. Signature Elements: mini delivery bag, noodle bowl, and small motion bubbles supports the mascot action without turning the image into a full illustration; the result stays like a real usable small-shop mascot logo. Style: Playful mascot wordmark logo with flat clean vector-like shapes, rounded exaggerated character design, bold custom lettering, light retro-shop charm, IP-ready brand personality, and commercial logo polish. Color Palette: Bright but controlled two-to-four-color logo palette with clean contrast, simple filled shapes, pale background, and enough restraint for real storefront or packaging use. Lighting: Flat logo presentation with crisp edges, subtle print-friendly depth only where it helps readability, and clean separation between mascot, wordmark, and secondary text. Typography: Render Momo Food Express as the main readable custom wordmark; add LOCAL DELIVERY as small integrated secondary type; keep all text intentional and part of the logo system. Restrictions: Keep one coherent original mascot, integrated wordmark, readable brand name, compact subtitle, simple centered logo structure, clean outlines, and commercial brand-system usability.

Scene: fast food ordering app and snack shop defines the small-shop brand context while the logo remains centered on a clean white or pale background for packaging, avatar, sticker, and storefront use. Composition: Fixed square 1:1 logo composition: mascot and wordmark integrated as one mark, readable Little Elephant Fast Food lettering, compact FAST FOOD secondary text, centered balance, clear silhouette, and small supporting prop detail: tiny burger, fries, and rounded badge dots. Signature Elements: tiny burger, fries, and rounded badge dots supports the mascot action without turning the image into a full illustration; the result stays like a real usable small-shop mascot logo. Style: Playful mascot wordmark logo with flat clean vector-like shapes, rounded exaggerated character design, bold custom lettering, light retro-shop charm, IP-ready brand personality, and commercial logo polish. Color Palette: Bright but controlled two-to-four-color logo palette with clean contrast, simple filled shapes, pale background, and enough restraint for real storefront or packaging use. Lighting: Flat logo presentation with crisp edges, subtle print-friendly depth only where it helps readability, and clean separation between mascot, wordmark, and secondary text. Typography: Render Little Elephant Fast Food as the main readable custom wordmark; add FAST FOOD as small integrated secondary type; keep all text intentional and part of the logo system. Restrictions: Keep one coherent original mascot, integrated wordmark, readable brand name, compact subtitle, simple centered logo structure, clean outlines, and commercial brand-system usability.
